24:T485,{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"RealEstateListing","name":"Shop-Cum-Office Plots — Pine Wood Centre, Sector 108","description":"Shop-cum-office plots in Pine Wood Centre, the dedicated commercial hub of Emaar's Mohali Hills township in Sector 108. Each plot permits a basement plus ground and three floors (approx. 4,140 sq. ft. of built-up potential), fronting the 200-ft wide Landran–Banur highway with the international airport around ten minutes away. The centre is planned with parking for over 600 cars, and sits within Emaar's 3,000-acre master-planned community — right beside our own office at Thakral Towers, so every site visit is personally conducted.","url":"https://www.inderthakral.com/properties/pinewood-centre-sco-sector-108/","image":"https://www.inderthakral.com/properties/Commercial_plots_in_Mohali_2K_202607201914.jpeg","address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Pine Wood Centre, Sector 108, Emaar Mohali Hills","addressRegion":"Punjab","addressCountry":"IN"},"broker":{"@type":"RealEstateAgent","name":"Inder Thakral Property Consultants","telephone":"+919815901234","url":"https://www.inderthakral.com"}}1b:[["$","script",null,{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$24"}}],["$","script",null,{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"BreadcrumbList\",\"itemListElement\":[{\"@type\":\"ListItem\",\"position\":1,\"name\":\"Home\",\"item\":\"https://www.inderthakral.com/\"},{\"@type\":\"ListItem\",\"position\":2,\"name\":\"Properties\",\"item\":\"https://www.inderthakral.com/properties/\"},{\"@type\":\"ListItem\",\"position\":3,\"name\":\"Shop-Cum-Office Plots — Pine Wood Centre, Sector 108\",\"item\":\"https://www.inderthakral.com/properties/pinewood-centre-sco-sector-108/\"}]}"}}],["$","$L25",null,{"property":{"id":"pinewood-centre-sco-sector-108","title":"Shop-Cum-Office Plots — Pine Wood Centre, Sector 108","type":"Commercial","size":"115–120 Sq.
